description: Create a new community. Requires an approved user account.

main.description: Create a new community with the specified handle and DID method.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or validation failed.

errors.name: HandleTaken
errors.description: The requested handle is already in use.

handle.description: Community handle (3-30 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens).

didMethod.description: DID method to use for the community identity (plc or web).

domain.description: Domain for did:web communities. Required when didMethod is 'web'.

displayName.description: Optional display name for the community.

visibility.description: Community visibility: public or private. Defaults to 'public'.

joinPolicy.description: Join policy: open or approval. Defaults to 'open'.

did.description: The DID assigned to the new community.

primaryRotationKey.description: Primary rotation key (did:plc only). Returned once and never stored.
